skills.name: salesperson-preparedness-scorecard
skills.description: Free 5-minute scorecard for founders who do their own selling and want to know how to close more deals, generate better leads, and improve their sales process. Produces a tailored report.

skills.name: revenue-independence-scorecard
skills.description: Free 10-minute scorecard for founders who want a comprehensive view of their revenue system, whether they can scale, step back, or hire confidently. Produces a tailored report.

skills.name: revenue-starter-playbook
skills.description: Paid engagement that builds a step-by-step playbook for founders who need help fixing new business generation so they can hire, step back, and grow predictably. $3,500 + GST, 4 weeks.

skills.name: revenue-architecture-playbook
skills.description: Paid engagement that builds a comprehensive 14-part revenue playbook for founders whose whole business runs through them, or who are scaling, building a team, or preparing to sell. $10,000 + GST, 4-6 weeks.
